creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: yuri
Date: Wed Jul 18 20:22:15 UTC 2018
New revision: 474897
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/474897

Log:
  x11-toolkits/py-xlib: Update 0.21 -> 0.23-4

  I am updating to 0.23-4 because of this bug https://github.com/python-xlib/python-xlib/issues/121
  It renders py-xlib broken on all systems with UNIX socket X11 DISPLAY, which is often/always a default.

  PR:		229872
  Approved by:	Eero H?nninen <fax@nohik.ee> (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/x11-toolkits/py-xlib/Makefile
  head/x11-toolkits/py-xlib/distinfo
